title: Roasted Russian Vegetable Delight
description: A hearty and flavorful dish featuring roasted Russian vegetables, perfect for a comforting meal. This recipe is easy to make and packed with nutrients.
instructions: Cut the Russian vegetables into bite-sized pieces.
Place the vegetables in a bowl and toss with olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Transfer the vegetables to a baking sheet and roast in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until tender.
While the vegetables are roasting, melt the butter in a small saucepan over low heat.
Once the vegetables are done, remove them from the oven and toss with the melted butter.
Serve the roasted vegetables hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
